beats.title: Discussing Soomi
beats.description: Jomus and Giancarlo recollect on how useful Soomi has been. They allude to her potent psy augur and how it's been imperative that she was able to discover Ender was stealing documentation. They mention how they would reward her, but lesser humans don't get rewarded by ordained.

dialogue.text: It seems Soomina Kwon has proven useful, exposing the Commander like that...
Wouldn't you say, my liege?
You're too easily pleased, Giancarlo.
The girl still has much to tell.
I said I already told you everything!
Silence, little girl!!
you can see the history in everything you touch with your augur, right?
and you've touched all over the rat Ender's desk...so...
I will tell you when you've said enough....
stealing documents isn't all he's guilty of.

beats.title: Jomus's Ambition
beats.description: Giancarlo pivots to asking Jomus how he could ever be secure with Ender. How he could ever trust someone from *that* family. Jomus mentions that Giancarlo has him mistaken. Ender is no threat and the time for doing away with the pest is soon approaching. Jomus mentions that allowing Ender to feel some modicum of control is to their benefit. But it won't matter in the end.

dialogue.text: We should've done away with the bastard years ago.
Why let him walk freely as though we fear his treasonous goals?!
Fear?
I fear no man, no elf, nor god...
The accursed fool only walks because I allow him to.
And that allowance has run its course.
Once the last of the Nosferi's are dealt with, the heavens will part ways for my ambition
The land, sea, and skies of Viso all belong to the Ordained!
Starting with the forests of Laetowood. Our preparations for invasion are almost complete.
Good. We will bring order to these lands, Giancarlo.
Our people will rule among the very stars!

beats.title: Comedy Beat
beats.description:
- Darkness seeping from under the crack of the high security file room. Guards standing outside are non the wiser
- Ender and Obsius hustling on either side, looking through all of the files. Near the corner where Ender is standing, the black hole is on the ground.
- “Do you see it over there?!” Ender hurriedly whispers to Obsius whose flipping through a magazine unrelated to the Project V Tigris (comedy beat).
- “Hmmm no, but I’ve found something more valuable, little Ender!” He turns around and shows Ender the magazine. Ender looks, then snatches it from Obsius, “Ughhh…you moron…We’re not here for that! Look for the bloody document, will you?”
- End and Ob continue to look around. Ender has monologue of worry that the page contained information on how to rid the Augur wielder of tainted Augur.
- As he’s looking down, hemlock lowers upside down before him. He looks up stunned
- Obsius zooms back into Enders body

dialogue.text: Do you see it over there?!
Hmmm no, but I’ve found something more valuable, little Ender!

beats.title: Initial Interrogation
beats.description: Hemlock smiles cheekily and Ender is startled. He exclaims "Countess!". She lowers herself to the ground before him. Hemlock asks Ender how he got in the high security file room. Camera pans to the ground where the pool of darkness is dissipating. Ender is stunned and says nothing. Hemlock says "Don't tell me. I'd rather like to keep the mystery of you." She playfully teases. Ender tries to back away, apologizing and making some excuse. Just as he's backing up, his hair is brushed by spindle. He looks up horrified as Hemlock introduces the Commander to her pet. She says she won't tell he's committing capital offenses if he surrenders himself to her. When Ender tries to object, spindle spins a web and ensnares Ender, slamming him to the wall.

beats.title: The seduction
beats.description: Hemlock gets dangerously close to Ender and begins to yearn for him. She teases him and whispers that she knows how bad he's wanted her and that Count Demen will never figure out what happens in these walls. Ender objects fiercely and she ups the anti on her seduction. Defiantly and realizing Ender won't break easy, she resolves to use her augur to find out Ender's true desire. At this point Obsius takes over. He toys with her egging her on to read him, but be prepared for what she may find as his desire. She leans his head to the scar side and impales his neck with a relentless kiss. Ender reacts (in a state similar to Necromancy). In her minds eye she sees a visual. A steamy passionate love affair of Ender and a woman. She's not sure who the woman is (it's Rou with hair white half pink hair). But this is enough to set her off because its not her. While she remains straddled to him, Commander Luna opens the door. He says the pair, they're wide eyed but Hemlock collects herself and gets off of Ender walking right passed Luna as he and Ender stare at each other.

(FLASHBACK) Close-up of Jomus's eye and intense veins

Ender and Obsius on opposite sides of the room, scrummaging to look for the document
